codeReview.summary: All 4 per-crate AGENTS.md files created successfully with all 5 required sections. Each file accurately documents the crate's purpose, public API with code signatures, architecture with diagrams, testing patterns, and dependencies.

summary: Feature docs-per-crate-agents-core passes review. Worker created comprehensive AGENTS.md files for swell-core (187 lines, 8.4KB), swell-llm (196 lines, 7.1KB), swell-tools (258 lines, 10.3KB), and swell-orchestrator (295 lines, 14.3KB). Each file contains all 5 required sections (Purpose, Public API, Architecture, Testing, Dependencies) with accurate code references, architecture diagrams, and testing patterns. Transcript shows worker followed the docs-worker skill procedure correctly, reading mission.md, validation-contract.md, exploring each crate's lib.rs and Cargo.toml before creating the documentation files. No issues found.
